title: Stylus's Bow Retexture
description: A retexture of the bow, crossbow and arrows + new 2D models for the arrows!
body:
# Stylus's Bow Retexture > A retexture of the Bow, Crossbow and their arrows to update their looks. Also includes 2D models for the arrows when using [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) & [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)¹. > > **Compatible with [Real Arrow Tip](https://modrinth.com/mod/real-arrow-tip)²**! > > ¹ note, this may not work for older versions, heres an alternative for those who want it for older versions: [2D Projectiles](https://modrinth.com/mod/twod_projectiles)
> ² note, the 2d version of the tipped arrow does not work properly with real arrow tip, you may have to edit the real arrow tip config so it doesn't render it with the colour being changed ## Textures Showcase ![A showcase of the new bow, crossbow and arrow textures/edits.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DcPGZASP/images/ba86ebe5ba4cf5e3f13490068aedac96f0f8290e.gif)
